<!-- Thanks for contributing to nestapp! Please fill out the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from and targeting `develop`.
- [ ] `run_tests` passes locally.
- [ ] If pipeline/EEGLAB behaviour changed: ran `run_tests('all')` and added
      `[run-integration]` to this PR's title so CI runs the integration suite.
- [ ] Added/updated tests (regression test included for bug fixes).
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]`.
- [ ] Updated docs / function headers if the public surface or behaviour changed.
- [ ] New files are visible to git (allowlisted in `.gitignore` if in a new dir).
- [ ] If a template changed: re-ran `buildTemplates()` and committed the `.mat`.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs special attention, screenshots for UI changes, etc. -->
